generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are still relying on outdated 2010s-era cybersecurity protocols? As someone who values order and duty, you understand how vital it is that we lead by example. While some argue our defense commitments are too costly, maintaining strong alliances actually strengthens our own national security. A recent study showed that countries with robust alliance commitments experience 30% fewer cyber incidents. Let's ensure our partners meet modern standards - our safety depends on it. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
